events.title: Israel and Iran Trade Direct Strikes
events.desc: Following intensified fighting between Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon, Israel and Iran engaged in direct strikes against each other on June 7. This exchange escalates regional tensions and complicates U.S.-Iranian negotiations, as Iran had previously linked talks to an end of Israeli actions against Hezbollah.

events.title: US Conducts Third Strike on Indian-Cewed Tanker
events.desc: A U.S. jet fired missiles into the engine room of the tanker Jalveer off Oman, confirmed by U.S. Central Command. The 20 crew members were reported safe. This marks the third strike on Indian-crewed tankers this week, with three Indian sailors previously killed in a strike on the Settebello tanker.

events.title: Israeli Strikes in Southern Lebanon Kill 17
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon resulted in 17 fatalities, with nine killed in the town of Tayr Debba. This follows a period of intensified fighting and ongoing concerns about the fragile ceasefire.

events.title: US Strikes Iran in Response to Helicopter Downing
events.desc: President Donald Trump stated that a US military helicopter was shot down over the Strait of Hormuz by Iran, vowing retaliation. The US subsequently conducted strikes against Iranian assets.

events.title: Israeli Air Strikes Hit Lebanese City of Tyre
events.desc: Despite an Iranian warning to cease attacks, Israeli air strikes hit the Lebanese city of Tyre. Israel stated the attacks were in response to Hezbollah firing at Israeli territory, indicating a continued cycle of retaliation.

events.title: US Military Attacks Iranian-crewed Oil Tanker
events.desc: A missile fired from a US fighter jet struck a sanctioned oil tanker off Oman, causing damage and prompting a distress call from the crew. Three Indian sailors were killed in a previous strike on a similar vessel.

events.title: Israel Strikes Beirut Suburb Days After Truce
events.desc: Israel conducted strikes on a Beirut suburb, stating it was in response to Hezbollah firing at Israeli territory. This occurred just days after a US-brokered truce, indicating the fragility of de-escalation efforts.

events.title: One Dead, Five Injured in Shooting in Israel
events.desc: A shooting incident in Israel resulted in one fatality and five injuries. The suspect reportedly fired from a car in multiple locations before being shot dead by authorities.

events.title: Seven-Month-Old Boy Killed by Israeli Troops
events.desc: A seven-month-old baby died after being shot by Israeli troops in the occupied West Bank. The incident highlights ongoing violence and casualties in the region.

events.title: Pentagon's AI Edge Threatened by Public Model Harvesting
events.desc: Adversaries can potentially compromise the Pentagon's AI-first warfighting capabilities not by breaching systems, but by harvesting the logic of publicly released frontier AI models. This risk is growing as the Defense Department relies on models developed by major tech firms.

events.title: Trump Claims Iran War Deal 'Approved', Cancels Strikes
events.desc: President Donald Trump announced that a deal to end the war with Iran was close to being signed, potentially over the weekend, and that threatened strikes on Iran were cancelled. This news led to a rally in stock markets and a drop in oil prices.

events.title: Iran-born Engineer Granted Bail Ahead of Trial Linked to Drone Strike
events.desc: An Iranian-born engineer, Mahdi Sadeghi, was granted bail by a US judge days before his trial. He faces charges related to illegally procuring technology for navigation systems used in Iran's military drones, linked to a deadly 2024 drone attack on a US military base in Jordan.

events.title: Israel Launches Overnight Strikes Across Gaza
events.desc: Videos shared by Palestinian activists show significant Israeli airstrikes across the Gaza Strip during the night.

events.title: Displaced Families Bury Hezbollah Dead in Temporary Graves
events.desc: In southern Lebanon, displaced families are resorting to temporary graves for Hezbollah fighters killed in Israeli strikes, as they cannot return to their border villages. This highlights the ongoing impact of the conflict on civilian populations and the challenges of proper burials.

events.title: US confirms third strike on Indian-crewed tankers this week
events.desc: A U.S. jet fired two missiles into the engine room of the tanker Jalveer off Oman on Thursday, U.S. Central Command confirmed, as authorities said the 20 crew members were safe after the third strike on Indian-crewed tankers this week. Three Indian sailors died in a U.S. strike on the Settebello tanker off Oman a day earlier.
